Container.Name: telegram-video-matic
Container.Description: Self-hosted Telegram media downloader with automatic channel/topic monitoring, smart naming for Jellyfin/Plex, retry logic, and pruning. Single container, one port.

Variable.Name: PUID
Variable.Description: User ID the app runs as; must own the appdata dir. Unraid default: 99 (nobody).

Variable.Name: PGID
Variable.Description: Group ID the app runs as; must own the appdata dir. Unraid default: 100 (users).

Variable.Name: TVM_SECRET_KEY
Variable.Description: Encryption key for storing Telegram API credentials. Required. Generate with: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))"

Variable.Name: TVM_APP_PASSWORD
Variable.Description: Web UI login password. Leave empty for open access (LAN only, not recommended).

Variable.Name: POLL_INTERVAL_SEC
Variable.Description: Default poll interval in seconds. Runtime-tunable via API. Default: 300 (5 min).

Variable.Name: MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS
Variable.Description: Maximum parallel downloads. Runtime-tunable via API. Default: 3.

Variable.Name: RETENTION_DAYS
Variable.Description: Retention period in days. Runtime-tunable via API. Default: 90.

Variable.Name: RETENTION_DISK_PCT
Variable.Description: Retention disk percentage threshold. Runtime-tunable via API. Default: 80.

Variable.Name: TZ
Variable.Description: Timezone for schedule-day evaluation. Examples: UTC, America/New_York, Europe/London.
